source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local event surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.8|seg.1.1.1.11|seg.1.1.1.12
distilled_thesis: By the end of the bounded slice, Zarathustra's going-under is no longer merely announced; it has begun as the route's operative movement.
